fields.label: Species key
fields.description: Stable Landscape Archive identifier for a canonical species record.

fields.label: Taxon ID
fields.description: Darwin Core taxon identifier (typically GBIF speciesKey).

fields.label: Scientific name
fields.description: Scientific name as published in the source record.

fields.label: Accepted scientific name
fields.description: Currently accepted scientific name for the taxon.

fields.label: Canonical name
fields.description: Normalized canonical label used for archive joins.

fields.label: Vernacular name
fields.description: Common or vernacular name for scheduling and public communication.

fields.label: Family
fields.description: Botanical family.

fields.label: Genus
fields.description: Botanical genus.

fields.label: Specific epithet
fields.description: Species epithet within the genus.

fields.label: Taxon rank
fields.description: Taxonomic rank (species, subspecies, variety, etc.).

fields.label: Class
fields.description: Higher taxonomic class.

fields.label: State distribution
fields.description: Australian state/territory distribution summary.

fields.label: Native status
fields.description: Native, introduced, or naturalised status for Australian contexts.

fields.label: Conservation status
fields.description: Conservation or listing status where available.

fields.label: Occurrence count
fields.description: Merged GBIF occurrence total for distribution context.

fields.label: Growth forms
fields.description: Practice-oriented growth-form tags (tree, shrub, grass, etc.).

fields.label: Trait observations
fields.description: Count of trait observations contributing to the species profile.

fields.label: Unique traits
fields.description: Number of distinct trait terms populated for the species.

fields.label: Plant height (m)
fields.description: Typical or recorded plant height in metres.

fields.label: Leaf length (mm)
fields.description: Leaf length in millimetres.

fields.label: Leaf width (mm)
fields.description: Leaf width in millimetres.

fields.label: Leaf area (mm²)
fields.description: Leaf area in square millimetres.

fields.label: Seed mass (mg)
fields.description: Seed mass in milligrams.

fields.label: Flowering time
fields.description: Flowering phenology band or month range.

fields.label: Fire response
fields.description: Fire-response strategy where recorded.

fields.label: Leaf phenology
fields.description: Evergreen, deciduous, or semi-deciduous behaviour.

fields.label: Specific leaf area
fields.description: Specific leaf area (mm²/mg) where available.

fields.label: Location method
fields.description: How the environmental sample point was chosen.

fields.label: Latitude
fields.description: WGS84 latitude for environmental context.

fields.label: Longitude
fields.description: WGS84 longitude for environmental context.

fields.label: Bounding box
fields.description: Geographic bounding box for context extraction.

fields.label: Soil organic carbon
fields.description: SLGA organic carbon indicator.

fields.label: Soil clay
fields.description: SLGA clay content indicator.

fields.label: Soil sand
fields.description: SLGA sand content indicator.

fields.label: Soil pH (water)
fields.description: SLGA pH in water indicator.

fields.label: Soil pH (CaCl₂)
fields.description: SLGA pH in CaCl₂ indicator.

fields.label: Available water capacity
fields.description: Plant-available water capacity from SLGA.

fields.label: Total nitrogen
fields.description: SLGA total nitrogen indicator.

fields.label: Total phosphorus
fields.description: SLGA total phosphorus indicator.

fields.label: Effective CEC
fields.description: SLGA effective cation exchange capacity.

fields.label: Depth of soil
fields.description: Sampled soil depth for SLGA layers.

fields.label: Climate window
fields.description: SILO aggregation window label.

fields.label: Annual rainfall
fields.description: Mean annual rainfall (mm) from SILO.

fields.label: Mean maximum temperature
fields.description: Mean maximum temperature (°C).

fields.label: Mean minimum temperature
fields.description: Mean minimum temperature (°C).

fields.label: Package type
fields.description: Revit or mesh package type identifier.

fields.label: Download ID
fields.description: Unique issued download identifier.

fields.label: Generated at
fields.description: ISO timestamp when the package was generated.

fields.label: Source artifact
fields.description: Canonical archive artifact reference.

fields.label: Record source
fields.description: Upstream record pipeline identifier.

fields.label: Trait source
fields.description: Trait normalization pipeline identifier.

fields.label: Environment source
fields.description: Environmental join pipeline identifier.

fields.label: Commercial use plan
fields.description: Entitlement tier governing commercial use.

fields.label: Rights status
fields.description: Overall rights posture for the package.

fields.label: Trait rights status
fields.description: Rights posture for trait evidence.

fields.label: Image rights status
fields.description: Rights posture for bundled imagery.

fields.label: Derived context release rule
fields.description: Rule governing release of derived environmental joins.

fields.label: Revit archetype
fields.description: Landscape Archive Revit archetype key.

fields.label: Revit archetype confidence
fields.description: Confidence score for archetype assignment.

fields.label: Asset status
fields.description: Readiness status in the LA asset pipeline.

fields.label: Family template
fields.description: Revit family template identifier.

fields.label: Publisher name
fields.description: Publisher attribution name.

fields.label: Schema version
fields.description: TLA bundle schema version (legacy key name retained in v1).

fields.label: Project ID
fields.description: Stable project identifier within the publishing organisation.

fields.label: Project title
fields.description: Human-readable project title.

fields.label: Organisation node ID
fields.description: Publishing practice, university, or council node identifier.

fields.label: Organisation node type
fields.description: Type of publishing organisation.

fields.label: Jurisdiction country
fields.description: ISO country code (AU for Australian projects).

fields.label: State or territory
fields.description: Australian state or territory code.

fields.label: Local government area
fields.description: LGA name or code where applicable.

fields.label: Locality
fields.description: Suburb, town, or locality label.

fields.label: Project phase
fields.description: Design or delivery phase.

fields.label: Foundation Approved flag
fields.description: True when bundle passes Foundation Approved validation.

fields.label: Updated at
fields.description: Last metadata update timestamp.

fields.label: Soil order
fields.description: High-level soil order classification band.

fields.label: Clay percent band
fields.description: Clay content band for site context.

fields.label: Sand percent band
fields.description: Sand content band for site context.

fields.label: Soil pH band
fields.description: pH band for site context disclosure.

fields.label: Organic carbon band
fields.description: Organic carbon band for site context.

fields.label: Soil profile source
fields.description: Dataset or method used for soil bands.

fields.label: Köppen class
fields.description: Köppen climate classification band.

fields.label: Rainfall band (mm)
fields.description: Annual rainfall disclosure band.

fields.label: Temperature band
fields.description: Temperature disclosure band.

fields.label: Climate band source
fields.description: Dataset used for climate bands.

fields.label: Slope class
fields.description: Site slope classification.

fields.label: Elevation (m)
fields.description: Site elevation in metres.

fields.label: Exposure
fields.description: Coastal / inland exposure class.

fields.label: Microclimate notes
fields.description: Free-text microclimate notes suitable for open disclosure.

fields.label: Climate positive claim
fields.description: Whether the project claims climate-positive outcomes.

fields.label: Carbon sequestration (kg CO₂e/yr)
fields.description: Estimated annual sequestration.

fields.label: Embodied carbon (kg CO₂e)
fields.description: Embodied carbon estimate for planting scope.

fields.label: Water sensitive design
fields.description: WSUD or water-sensitive design flag.

fields.label: Native planting percent
fields.description: Percent of planting area using native species.

fields.label: Disclosure standard
fields.description: Named disclosure or reporting standard used.

fields.label: Evidence label
fields.description: Label for linked sustainability evidence.

fields.label: Evidence URI
fields.description: URI to supporting sustainability evidence.

fields.label: Evidence method
fields.description: Calculation or assessment method for evidence item.

fields.label: Sensitivity class
fields.description: Controls public vs restricted cultural metadata.

fields.label: Cultural engagement level
fields.description: Documented level of Connection to Country engagement.

fields.label: Protocol authority reference
fields.description: Reference to Traditional Owner protocol authority.

fields.label: Connection to Country summary
fields.description: Public-safe cultural summary when sensitivity is open.

fields.label: Restricted payload reference
fields.description: Pointer to organisation-held restricted cultural record.

fields.label: Redaction notice
fields.description: Notice explaining redaction in public indexes.

fields.label: Asset ID
fields.description: Stable botanical asset identifier within a project bundle.

fields.label: Quantity
fields.description: Planned or placed quantity for the asset.

fields.label: Quantity unit
fields.description: Unit for quantity (each, m², linear metres).

fields.label: Water requirement class
fields.description: Irrigation demand band.

fields.label: Source registry
fields.description: Optional open registry URI for the asset.

fields.label: Implementation product reference
fields.description: Optional commercial SKU linking open metadata to a product.

fields.label: Botanical Name
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_BotanicalName mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Common Name
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_CommonName mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Family
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_Family mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Genus
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_Genus mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Form
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_Form mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Specification Code
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_SpecificationCode mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Specification Section
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_SpecificationSection mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Drawing Tag
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_DrawingTag mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Keynote
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_Keynote mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Mature Height M
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_MatureHeightM mapped to TLA-169.

fields.label: Mature Spread M
fields.description: Revit shared parameter LA_MatureSpreadM mapped to TLA-169.
